productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Great Sound, Comfortable, Long Battery Life
reviewText: Really pleased with these – comfortable to wear, sound quality is great and the charge seems to last a long, long time.The earbuds come in an attractive  and functional box and feel like a quality product straight away.  The box contains the earbuds themselves, a c-usb cable (the same as newer Samsung phones) two additional pairs of ear tips (total of three different sizes), the charging case and an instruction manual.Make sure you choose the right size tips for you so that the earbuds are held securely and comfortably in the ears.  The units look a little bulky at first, but they actually fit really well and I’ve found I can wear for a long period without them becoming tiring or uncomfortable.Bluetooth connection to my phone was easy and quick and the signal is strong enough for me to move a good distance from my phone in the house.  Bluetooth earphones I’ve had before have lost contact just a few feet away meaning I had to carry the phone around to listen to music uninterrupted.  Not these earbuds – my house isn’t huge, but I can easily leave the phone in one spot and go from room to room playing music through the earbuds without a problem.The charging case is a nice sleek little unit – the lid closes with a reassuring magnetic catch and the earbuds are also magnetically pulled into their moulded slots.  The case itself is a ‘power pack’ really complete with four indicator lights that show how much charge it contains.  You charge up the case using the cable or with a cordless phone charger (if you have one), then it charges the earbuds when you put them in the case.  I haven’t really been able to see exactly how long they last on a charge - I’ve done a fair bit of listening and they are still going strong!  The claim is 6 hours ‘standalone’ or 30+ hours when using the case.  In fact I've just noticed that my phone tells me how much charge is left in the earbuds!So what about the sound – I’m a musician, so sound quality is important.  Overall there’s a good response across the full frequency range.  They keep out external sound very effectively and unlike earbuds with wires, there's no additional sound as you move your head around.  Bass is nice and deep – you can ‘feel’ it at the back of your neck and there’s nothing in any frequency that hurts your ears.  I tested out with my usual sound reference (Dire Straits, Brothers In Arms) and everything sounded pretty much like it should.My phone rang during the first listening session and they worked as a good hands-free device (you can just use the right earbud for this purpose if you want to).  Also a double press on the right earbud button and it links to your phone's voice assistant!  I haven't tried the waterproof feature yet!!All in all – a really nice set of earbuds – no annoying cable noise when your walking around.  Good value; they don’t feel, look or sound cheap and will give you loads of listening time between charges.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: For only £29 compared to what you’d get for over £100 and more these are amazing! Ok so they may not be the best for sound quality but it’s not a massive problem as they still sound great. They might also look like gigantic black snails in your ears but meh, that’s fine because these are really good! The battery lasts a long time (haven’t tested how long) and the case they come in comes fully charged. For the price you really can’t go wrongYou can talk on the phone using these although sometimes you may sound a little muffled. Volume control and changing/pausing songs takes some getting used to if you’re never used wireless earphones before.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: I read and watched so many reviews of wireless earbuds, to the point of tedium!! At the end of the day I needed earbuds that I could use all day, when out running listening to music and podcasts, to watching online movies and YouTube and for listening in bed to fall asleep. Water and sweat resistance was a must and a good fit with better than average sound quality as I listen to a lot of music. I also had to be sure of no lag on movies and YouTube video. All this without being able to try them first!!! Let's be honest, a lot of reviews are trying to sell you the product, so I'm always a bit sceptical, but you can soon cut through this and get a general feeling if a product is actually any good. These earbuds are, they are very good. They do feel and bit cheap when you first get them in your hand, it's that brittle feeling plastic, but when you put them in to listen, they feel great, super comfy. I walked around a bit with them in, they felt secure, so I decided to try them out in a run. No problems, a 6k run and they stayed in place no problems. Watching on line movies and YouTube you have no lag at all and the sound quality is great. For music they are very good indeed, they're not going to give you the immersive soundstage of the very top products that cost four or five times as much, but they are very good. Crisp highs, good miss and a nice bass, not boomy, just present and well crafted.The button controls work extremely well and have a good feel, not a hard press, just a nice click with enough resistance to avoid accidental pushes and but not so hard you push the earbud into your ear, spot on. You get skip forward/back, volume up/down, answer/end call, your assistant (Google in my case), play and pause, everything you need.Battery life has been excellent, at 50% volume they went just over six hours and recharged in the case in about and hour and a half.I'm delighted and honestly quite surprised. For the money they're excellent, even for more money they'd be excellent.The big test for me is always, if I lost them or something happened to them would I buy them again? Yes, definitely. Have an amazing day.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: These earphones are fantastic.  I had wireless earphones before where the left and right were connected by a cable.  I didn’t want to lose them if they fell out. However, “true wireless” have surpassed my expectations.They fit perfectly. They never move or slip. They just stick!The chargeable case is wonderful.They also charge automatically as soon as they are removed from the case. Then, they switch off automatically when returned to the case. So convenient and clever.My previous ones required buttons to be pressed to switch them on and then usually the bluetooth didn’t connect automatically.However, these earphones have been smooth from the start. The sound is also a step up from my previous earphones and the price makes them a real bargain.The only negative point is that the volume is only controlled via your device. The earphones themselves have no volume control buttons. However, since I am so impressed by them, I can only give five stars.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: very good sound proofing, even when no sound is playing its difficult to hear anything outside of the earphones.they fit well in ears, good fit, nice and snugsound quality is good when turned up quite highthe button is kind of  pointless as you cant really press it while its in your ear as its hurts when pressed.battery life isn't the best, when fully charged they only last maybe 3-4 hours. sound also sometimes flickers between both buds which can last for up to 5 mins, which is very annoying.when sound is playing quietly there is a faint buzzing sound in the background, which you learn to tune out after a while.overall i wouldn't recommend getting these earphones as i think they are way over priced for what you get. will not be getting these earphones again in the future

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Totally impressed with my first pair of true wireless earbuds
reviewText: I wanted good earbuds at an affordable price.I looked at a lot of video reviews and came across these. I have hearing in one ear, so did not want to spend too much.I’m very impressed, build quality is excellent, clarity of sound is impressive with good bass and treble tones, I use Spotify’s equaliser to tweak what I hear.Bluetooth 5 connectivity range is great, it’s faultless with no drop outs even when I’ve left my phone indoors and gone to my garden.Battery life is good, not worn them for more than 4hrs at the moment with no problems, before they go back into the charging case  which also can be wirelessly charged.Calls made and received are clear even in noisey places.The earbuds are comfortable, lightweight  and you quickly forget your wearing them.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Sound quality is better than I expected from this price range. They are easy to connect. Volume control seems a bit not comfortable as it is by double pressing earphone. But it's fine. They seems to be a bit bulky in my ears but I will see - maybe I just need to get used to then. Soom I will check out how well they hold while running but till now the feeling is that they should hold tight. For calls - didn't had any problems. I was heard well and I heard well.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Bought them for my dad and he loves them but they can be finicky with connection on the rare occasion

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: So I bought these as a cheap solution to not owning a pair of headphones after trying out a well known and far more expensive version. The product arrived on time and came fully charged. After fiddling about with my phone to ensure I was getting the right balance of sound, they have done the job. They are really comfortable to wear. 4 stars because I think the noise cancellation could be a bit better. Overall a great purchase.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Perfect if you want to start going wireless
reviewText: Purchased in November. No big troubles so far.I was entering the market of wireless earphone to just check if it was for me without spending a fortune. So the first test was loosing them lots of times in the first month, sometimes the right, sometimes the left, sometimes the empty cabinet and sometime the whole thing! I've set up some strategies and this is now getting much better. Maybe adding a paging option would make things better from start, but I honestly don't know if this exists in more expensive ones.Sound quality. I'm not an audiophile bit I had better wired earphones in the past, so expect a really good sound quality but not top notch. I found annoying that even the minimum volume level could be too loud, but I have to try them with another phone.They have good ergonomic design but I felt some pain at the beginning until my ears were used to them. Once this is past, they can stay comfortably for more than two hours.Fantastic battery life, really, no other to say.Looking forward to the next upgrade from earfun.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Look great, sound not so great!
reviewText: So the Earfuns. Was expecting more from them if I’m honest after reading some of the reviews. Let’s start with the positives first. Overall look, design, packaging etc is fine. Quits a good looking product. As for fit, after a couple of uses you get a feel for how they should be inserted to the ear and once you have found their happy place they are reasonably comfortable. Battery life so far is good. A bonus having the case holding a charge of its own. I charge it on a wireless charging pad and it works a treat. So far so good. Now to the sound, and being that’s what you are buying the device for this is where they really fall down. No matter what I try and after resetting them, disconnecting them numerous times, I find that the L bud is almost 50% louder than the R bud. I’ve tried changing IPhone 11 settings etc and still can’t get over this issue. I have even thought that it may have been an issue with my ears but even holding the L bud to the R ear and vice versa, there is a very noticeable difference between the 2 buds which is disappointing. I also find them to be very bassy. Really disappointed at having to score these as I have as I really was expecting more from them.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: They're comfortable. I don't really remember I'm using them during the day.They have volume control (I don't know why some people say they don't.). They've got very good battery, around 6 hours and they're kinda stylish.The bad part is that when I wear both earbuds, I basically can't hear the world, even if I put the volume low. It means that, I can't walk, because I hear my steps and even my heart beating. So, I get scared, since it's strange to walk not hearing ANYTHING around you (people, cars, pets, bugs, apocalypse and/or everything else).  So,  when I'm out, I just use one at a time. However, that's also good, specially when I'm watching videos and films at home. There's no delay on videos, by the way (I've also seen some people complaining about this).The microphone could be better during calls, but they work well if you're not in a noisy place. So, for regular calls, audio messages and videos, I don't really have a big deal.I think lots of buyers here got the 1st version,  with delay, mic and volume problems. I bought mine in June 2020, and I haven't experienced any problems so far. I strongly recommend them. I myself may buy another one for my wife.So,  if you want earbuds under €50, those are definitely a very good option.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: My update is.... In use I've had the right earbud drop the bluetooth link. The left earbud continues to operate solo. I've had to put the Right earbud back in the case and then take it out again. It reconnects and then functions fine.It's frustrating that it happens and if you are not carrying the box I guess your mono until you get back the wherever the box is.  Quite disappointing. So not the five star product I thought it was. Shame :-(Original review below:-I bought these to use while running on my treadmill. I've used them a couple of times now and found them to be easy to use. They connected to my bluetooth and reconnected automatically when they were used next time. The sound quality is fine (i'm no expert) volume is ok.  comfort is good and they have not come close to falling out while i'm using them. The box they store and charge in is really good. I can't tell you how long the battery lasts but they still show full charge ofter over an hour of use.So for me this is a five star product.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Simple to set up and use
reviewText: First time I have ever used wireless ear phones. Instruction clear. Charging clear. Worked. Picked correct ear size. What I found difficult is me using it. Volume which ear piece does what. Used it a lot become second nature.  It does not stop back ground sound. I have nothing to compare this to. So for myself. What it use it for. Super.  I would recommend it.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: I received this item today, and one of the earbuds is extremely quiet. I've logged a warranty claim direct with Earfun so will see how this pans out. Disappointing I've been sent what appears to be faulty goods. Have tried resetting etc as described in the manual and online, still nothing fixing it.Weird as the left bud works fine, but the right one you can barely make out the power on/off and pairing announcements. When paired you can just make out music in this one bud.Hopefully I'll be contacted and advised on how to fix or sent replacements*Update - I was contacted by EarFun and sent replacement earbuds that work as expected.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Can't really fault the product. only real problem (but may to just me) as a cyclist riding in all weather when its raining I wipe my forehead I will sometimes knock the ear piece and it would be flung out my ear (happened twice, found it both times) but it does feel comfortable and they don't feel heavy in your heavy.But would 100% buy again.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Good sound at a cheap price.
reviewText: Ive only had them for a couple of days, but the fit is great and for the money the sound is quite good (base is better than some more expensive buds I have tried). I used them on and off for about 4 hours and didn't need to charge the buds. Time will tell if the long term performance is reflected in the price, but for less than £40.00, can't go wrong.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Compact and nice looking. Does the job!
reviewText: Overall I'm happy with them- they are good size and comfortable to wear. No problems with sound but I have only used them 3 times. The case is compact and small and has a charge of its own- which is handy. The charging wire is type C though- and while it comes with a charging wire, is annoying to not have the universal wire used for most other electronic devices...so you dont have worry about leaving the charging cable at home.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Easy to use, fit the ear comfortably, great quality sound and fantastic value for money. Highly recommend ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Great

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Excellent earbuds at a bargain price
reviewText: This is my second set of earbuds from this company, this time these are for my wife after she saw mine! These ones a a more traditional shape compared to the other set from this manufacturer, and as such better suited to use at the gym etc as they fit nice and snugly in your ears.Sound quality is great, as long as you get a decent fit - that's key to all of the earbuds though, too loose and you will not get that punchy bass and will end up with a tinny sounding mess. Controls are simple, and there are features that you might not expect as this price like a wireless charging case and the option to use just a single earbud. For the price it's really hard to fault them, really good sound quality at a decent price.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: A lot more comfortable than I expected, sit in your ear really well. I'm yet to experience them falling out while moving around. The sound quality is brilliant for the price, would recommend them to anyone looking for a pair of wireless headphones that connect via Bluetooth.Press the 'earfun' button on the earbud for 2 seconds for it to connect, hold 5 seconds for it to disconnect, and turn it off.Earbuds can be used separately if you need to use one at a time for whatever reason.The charging case charges the earbuds wirelessly until the case needs a charge via USB-C cable, which is brilliant.Easily a 9/10 for me! :)

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Good all round sound and pretty small. Less obvious than airpods.
reviewText: At first I was sceptical of them. The reviews were good and the price fantastic. When I received them the packaging was higher quality than expected. They came with a USB c to usb a cable which was nice. Although it fitted very tightly and made me concerned I'd break something removing it. But other cables work well so it might just be a tolerance issue. The case the pods are stored in is a durable plastic. No worries about build quality. The earpods fit the ears well and provide good isolation from outside noises. The volume is good not overpowering just loud enough at full blast to be uncomfortable. The sound quality at all volumes is pretty good clear with a balanced sound. Bass is not strong but enough. I'm yet to drain the battery and connection is solid.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: I got this earbuds more than 2 weeks ago. I tested it before providing reasonable review. I received it in good condition and nice packaging.The sound quality is good, since it’s not HD but stereo sound as advertised. Mic quality is poor. I tested it by calling my friend and the feedback is like I’m far away from the mic and there are instances of dropping off / static line.Value for money: not bad for £45.99 however compared with other brands of wireless earphones where you can get the same features without mic issues and dropping off.Comfort: the fit is too large for my ears. You cannot wear it longer.Battery life: It lasted for 4 hours of continuous use.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Had interference issues with sound cutting in and out. Fixed by re-pairing the buds.Left bud stopped working and wouldn't turn on but would still charge. Difficult to email company directly so I used Messenger and got a replacement in 3 days.Wish it had touch and volume controls on the buds but can't complain at this price point.2/3 off the price of Galaxy Buds with most of the benefits and 3/4 off the price of the Airpods and Airpods Pro with even more benefits.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Really like the sound.  Fit in ear is easy for me as i have average sized ear canals. Several sizes provided.  Decent volumes achievable although they don't need to go too loud.  Slight distortion in rhs unit. Charge in case gives great extended battery life.  Decent Bluetooth connection but volume up control at bud is glitchy. Volume down control at bud operates well. Similar for track + / - control at bud. Compensated by really good sound. Especiallly at this price.  Compares favourably to wired in ear units and full size on ear units

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: What I’ve used them for they are amazing
reviewText: I have had genuine apple airpods for coming up to two years, and I have worn them out through extreme heavy use. I was planning to just buy a new pair, however my friend recommended me these so I decided I’ll give them a go and I’m so glad I did. They are reasonably comfortable, fit in my ears and connect to both my iPhone and iPad with ease. Not used much but they were great for tv playback not cutting the voices at all, and for music playback, they get plenty loud (much more than my airpods do now). I wore them to Tesco and somebody even asked if they were the much more expensive (£280) sennheizers. Would definitely recommend to anyone looking for a cheap pair of wireless headphones.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Would anyone think that buds so cheap could produce decent quality sound? Well, these certainly do.They're no Bose JBL, or Sony, but value for money, they're incredible.Recommended for everyday use with radio, phones, and music  streaming.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Good sound; uncomfortable; great customer service.
reviewText: The overall design is clean and sleek. The case is light and the earbuds fit with magnets - very satisfying. The sound is pretty good, deep bass as indicated, but a bit low. It pairs with your device very quickly.The thing is: they are really uncomfortable and the microphone doesn't work very well. The rounded part rests on your ear and over time it starts to hurt.I have returned these and since then the company has contacted me. Great customer service. It's a shame these are so uncomfortable because their portable speaker (EarFun Go) is great.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: I initially bought a pair of these ear buds and the first pair kept disconnecting, so I returned them. Earfunaudio followed up and sent me a replacement pair that worked, and do not disconnect. For music they are fine, and work on calls also - but as they block out the background noise, you hear yourself muffled when on calls - which I personally don't like. Other than that they work well.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Fabulous gift for those who love music in gym
reviewText: My husband lost his airpods and he was sad about it for a while. I bought this product for him as a replacement. I am very happy with this purchase which is much cheaper than the previous ones. The buds are little bigger than the Apple ones, but actually they are very lightweight, and it comes with ear-tips in different sizes(S/M/L), very soft&comfortable to wear.Fast paring, and fit the ears well, perfect for using in the gym. The sound quality surprises me as well. Have tried them for several times in cycling and running, the buds like sticking to ears firmly and don’t fall off at all. My husband is happy with his gift. I am thinking about buying another one for myself, then I can enjoy music doing gardening!

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Hi there, I got this earphones delivered on 8th May and they are brilliant quality and I loved them, but the left earphone just stopped working as there was a manual connection problem inside. When I sqeeze it gently, it comes back for a split second, but it does not work otherwise. The right one is perfect. I do not want to reassemble it, there is no way for me to do that. I am very disappointed as I was 100% happy with the quality and there was no reason to lose one side. I did not drop them, did not even wear them in rain despite they're waterproof. I cannot get in touch with customer support for this product so I am asking here is someone could help me out as there sure must be a garrantee on them after 6 months of using. Please email or call me!

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Not impressed with this product, sound production or output wasn't good enough not really happy with it.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Nice ear buds, very good sound quality, but a little light on the bass. No problems with connection. I liked these buds quite a lot but, the second time I tried charging these the case died on me. The case would not accept any charge and would not supply charge to the ear buds anymore, it was completely dead. Amazon refunded me. I would have repurchased these buds but the price increased and I also had problems trying to return these due to royal mail not accepting faulty products with battery problems.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: I've tried numerous Bluetooth earbuds.  I have never found a product that stayed in my ears while running, these do not fall out even on a jog on a hot day or while raining!  I love being able to shower and listen to music/news and not disturb anyone else.I read all the positive reviews but found an advantage no-one has seen...I have trouble sleeping, so sometimes watch tv while my partner sleeps.  I used to have a huge pair of closed headphones, but with these, I can watch TV without disturbing her even with her right next to me!Everyone I have shown these have been extremely impressed!

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: These earphones give you so much value for what you are paying for, not only do they sound really good but they have so many features that make these things convenient to use. They will connect to your phone within a second of taking them out of their case , if they are paired with the phone. They use usb c and have fast and wireless charging capability. My only complaint is that the button controls can often hurt my ears as you are basically pushing the earphone in your ear when you press the button, other than that, these are incredible for the price

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Sometimes one earbud (always the left one) doesn't connect automatically. But I like these they have a long battery life and 2 different ways to charge them. Get these if you like to work out as they do not fall out very easily.

reviewText: Pros : They are well built. Good battery. Comfortable.Cons : The buttons dont do anything other than freeze my lg v20 but work flawlessly on my iphone so thats something to look out for and the sound quality isnt my cup of tea. It lacks detail and is a bit muddy.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: So, first off, for the price you pay, I don't think you can get much better.They pair easily with your phone, fit comfortably, and have usb-c charging. Now, the sound quality, and noise cancellation aren't the best, but at this price I don't think you'll find much better.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewTitle: Best Earbuds at the best price
reviewText: Genuinely the best earbuds out their without spending over €200 and I would argue that these could compete with a lot of the more expensive brands.The fit in your ear is very snug with very little risk of them coming out even during intense exercise in rain/ damp conditions.Cannot recommend them enough I had the previous model and the new 2020 model is even better allowing you to use both earbuds independently and improving the connection and a few other small things

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
reviewText: Decent headphones and I was happy with them when they had arrived, but they've become quite quiet for some reason. It started with just the left headphone but now both of them have gone incredibly quiet, even after a full charge.

productTitle: EarFun Free 1S Wireless Earbuds, 4 Mics ENC Bluetooth Earbuds for Clear Call, 7mm Composite Drivers, Powerful Sound, App for Custom EQ, Sweatshield™ IPX7 Waterproof, Wireless Charging, Game Mode, 30H
